title: Mister Ten Per Cent
writer: Mira Avrech, Charlie Drake, Norman Hudis
actors: Charlie Drake, Derek Nimmo, Wanda Ventham
plot: Percy Pointer's passion in life is the theatre, and all his spare time is devoted to the play he is writing.When it's finished it arrives on the desk of a London impresario, at a time when he wants to stage a flop.
